calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Set Aside Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MARIA G. CHAVEZ MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCES: Elizabeth A. MacDonald, Esq. 922-5939 for pltf & opposing party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Motion granted in view of the signed stipulation to set aside default judgment. In addition, the Court sets aside the default as well; defendant has 10 days to answer. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
